case_title: CUADRA, CARLOS vs. MARTIN, CRAIG K. ESQ. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUADRA, CARLOS SERVED OCT-22-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, CRAIG K. ESQ.
CASE QUESTIONNAIRE FILED BY PLFF

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON: DEFT C.MARTIN IS NOT PRESENT. ATNY W.FRANCOIS APPEARS IN COURT FOR DEFT; SUBSTITUTION OF ATNY SUBMITTED IS SIGNED BY ATNY FOR DEFT BUT NOT ACTUALLY BY DEFT. MR. FRANCOIS' ORAL MOT TO CONTINUE IS DENIED; INSUFFICIENT GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. CASE TO PROCEED AS A PROVE-UP AGAINST DEFT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, CRAIG K. ESQ. $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $965.07 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,965.07, PLUS COSTS AS PER COST BILL
